speaker: Atsvara Tarasar

context.speaker: scene
context.text: Atsvara steps into the detention area to speak to Cricket: 'If I get them to release you into my custody, can you promise not to murder, maim, or sue the constables here?'

reference: "HNNNNGGHHHH," the astromech replies, his wheels spinning fruitlessly in the air as he lies on the ground and rages. But even Cricket is smart enough to know a good out when one is presented, so after a few more moments of binary swearing he dials it down a notch. "I... fine. Yes yes, I PROMISE," he zots, "I PROMISE NOT TO VISIT JUSTICE UPON ALL WHO HAVE WRONGED ME. There, that good enough for you fascists?!"
